The '''''Gallant''''' was a [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]].

==History==
It was part of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] convoy that contained [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]]. The ships were [[Battle of Halbara|attacked]] by Imperial forces, but thanks to [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] the entire [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]] managed to escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
